message.content:
You are a senior frontend engineer reviewing a PR. Deeply review the following changes for SP_1BGXJ78.4 — "Playroom-style snippet search/insert menu (Cmd+K)" in a Storybook SDUI JSON editor addon.

The changes add:
1. `.storybook/addons/json-editor/sduiSnippets.ts` — snippet data definitions (all 13 SDUI component types + structure templates + 4 screen templates)
2. `.storybook/addons/json-editor/SnippetMenu.tsx` — searchable overlay modal with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, enter, escape), category grouping, dark/light mode, Playroom-inspired UI
3. Modified `.storybook/addons/json-editor/JsonEditorPanel.tsx` — added "+ Snippet" button in toolbar, snippet menu state, handleSnippetSelect handler (screen templates replace whole doc, components insert at cursor with comma handling)
4. Modified `.storybook/addons/json-editor/CodeMirrorEditor.tsx` — added onSnippetRequest prop, Mod-k keybinding to trigger snippet menu

Read all 4 files and review for:
- Correctness: Does the insertion logic handle edge cases (empty doc, cursor at start, cursor mid-object)?
- UX: Keyboard navigation, focus management, scroll-into-view behavior
- Dark/light mode consistency
- Memory leaks or cleanup issues
- Style consistency with the existing codebase patterns
- Any bugs or issues

Files to read:
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.storybook/addons/json-editor/sduiSnippets.ts
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.storybook/addons/json-editor/SnippetMenu.tsx
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.storybook/addons/json-editor/JsonEditorPanel.tsx
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.storybook/addons/json-editor/CodeMirrorEditor.tsx

Provide a structured review with: blocking issues, non-blocking suggestions, and overall assessment.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll perform a thorough review of the snippet search/insert feature implementation. Let me read all four files.

content.content:
1→export interface SDUISnippet {
     2→  id: string;
     3→  label: string;
     4→  category: 'component' | 'screen' | 'structure';
     5→  description: string;
     6→  json: string;
     7→}
     8→
     9→export const sduiSnippets: SDUISnippet[] = [
    10→  // ─── Components ──────────────────────────────────────────
    11→  {
    12→    id: 'heading',
    13→    label: 'Heading',
    14→    category: 'component',
    15→    description: 'Large title text (headingMDL)',
    16→    json: JSON.stringify({ type: 'heading', props: { text: 'Title' } }, null, 2),
    17→  },
    18→  {
    19→    id: 'text',
    20→    label: 'Text',
    21→    category: 'component',

    23→    json: JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', props: { text: 'Content' } }, null, 2),
    24→  },
    25→  {

    31→  },
    32→  {

    38→  },
    39→  {

    45→  },

    88→  {

    93→    json: JSON.stringify({ type: 'nav_header', props: { title: 'Screen Title', showBack: true } }, null, 2),
    94→  },
    95→  {
    96→    id: 'rich_text',
    97→    label: 'Rich Text',

   132→      body: [

   135→        { type: 'separator', props: { mt: 'xs', mb: 'xs' } },
   136→        { type: 'points_input', props: { label: 'Valor em reais', placeholder: 'R$ 0,00', contextKey: 'reais', mb: 'sm' } },
   137→        { type: 'balance_display', props: { label: 'Pontos disponíveis', pointsFormatted: '{{balance.pointsFormatted}}', priceFormatted: '{{balance.priceFormatted}}', mb: 'md' } },
   138→        { type: 'link', props: { text: 'Exibir regras de uso', align: 'center', mt: 'sm' } },
   139→      ],
   140→      footer: { type: 'button', props: { text: 'Criar voucher', mt: 'md' } },
   141→    }, null, 2),
   142→  },
   143→  {
   144→    id: 'screen_summary',
   145→    label: 'Voucher Summary',
   146→    category: 'screen',
   147→    description: 'Review confirmation before creating voucher',
   148→    json: JSON.stringify({
   149→      id: 'voucher-summary',
   150→      context: {
   151→        product: { name: 'Abastecimento' },
   152→        selectedPoints: '5.000',
   153→        selectedReais: 'R$ 50,00',
   154→      },
   155→      header: { type: 'nav_header', props: { title: 'Resumo', showBack: true } },
   156→      body: [
   157→        { type: 'heading', props: { text: 'Confirme seu voucher', mb: 'md' } },
   158→        { type: 'text', props: { text: '{{product.name}}', type: 'subtitleXXL', mb: 'sm' } },
   159→        { type: 'text', props: { text: '{{selectedPoints}} pontos', mb: 'xs' } },
   160→        { type: 'separator', props: { mt: 'xs', mb: 'xs' } },
   161→        { type: 'text', props: { text: '{{selectedReais}}', mb: 'sm' } },
   162→        { type: 'alert', props: { label: 'O voucher será criado e estará disponível em Meus Vouchers', type: 'info', icon: 'icon-info' } },
   163→      ],
   164→      footer: { type: 'button', props: { text: 'Criar voucher', mt: 'md' } },
   165→    }, null, 2),
   166→  },
   167→  {
   168→    id: 'screen_conclusion',
   169→    label: 'Voucher Conclusion',
   170→    category: 'screen',
   171→    description: 'Success screen after voucher creation',
   172→    json: JSON.stringify({
   173→      id: 'voucher-conclusion',
   174→      context: { product: { name: 'Abastecimento' } },
   175→      body: [
   176→        { type: 'icon_text_row', props: { icon: 'icon-check-circle', iconColor: '#4caf50', text: '', mb: 'md' } },
   177→        { type: 'heading', props: { text: 'O voucher foi criado!', mb: 'sm' } },
   178→        { type: 'text', props: { text: 'Seu voucher de {{product.name}} está disponível em Meus Vouchers', mb: 'md', align: 'center' } },
   179→      ],
   180→      footer: { type: 'button', props: { text: 'Ir para o início', mt: 'md' } },
   181→    }, null, 2),
   182→  },
   183→  {
   184→    id: 'screen_rules',
   185→    label: 'Voucher Rules',
   186→    category: 'screen',
   187→    description: 'Rules of use screen for voucher',
   188→    json: JSON.stringify({
   189→      id: 'voucher-rules',
   190→      context: { product: { name: 'Abastecimento' } },
   191→      header: { type: 'nav_header', props: { title: 'Regras de uso', showBack: true } },
   192→      body: [
   193→        { type: 'section_heading', props: { text: 'Regras de uso — {{product.name}}', mb: 'md' } },
   194→        { type: 'icon_text_row', props: { icon: 'icon-check', text: 'O voucher tem validade de 30 dias', mb: 'sm' } },
   195→        { type: 'icon_text_row', props: { icon: 'icon-check', text: 'Pode ser utilizado parcialmente', mb: 'sm' } },
   196→        { type: 'icon_text_row', props: { icon: 'icon-check', text: 'Válido apenas para {{product.name}}', mb: 'sm' } },
   197→      ],
   198→    }, null, 2),
   199→  },
   200→];
   201→
   202→const categoryLabels: Record<SDUISnippet['category'], string> = {
   203→  component: 'Components',
   204→  structure: 'Structure',
   205→  screen: 'Screen Templates',
   206→};
   207→
   208→export function getSnippetsByCategory(): Array<{
   209→  category: SDUISnippet['category'];
   210→  label: string;
   211→  items: SDUISnippet[];
   212→}> {
   213→  const groups = new Map<SDUISnippet['category'], SDUISnippet[]>();
   214→  for (const s of sduiSnippets) {
   215→    const list = groups.get(s.category) ?? [];
   216→    list.push(s);
   217→    groups.set(s.category, list);
   218→  }
   219→  return (['component', 'structure', 'screen'] as const).map(cat => ({
   220→    category: cat,
   221→    label: categoryLabels[cat],
   222→    items: groups.get(cat) ?? [],
   223→  }));
   224→}
   225→
   226→export function filterSnippets(query: string): SDUISnippet[] {
   227→  if (!query.trim()) return sduiSnippets;
   228→  const q = query.toLowerCase();
   229→  return sduiSnippets.filter(
   230→    s =>
   231→      s.label.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   232→      s.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
   233→      s.id.includes(q) ||
   234→      s.category.includes(q),
   235→  );
   236→}
   237→
